Track effects in an array similar to state. Use an effectIndex that resets each render.
Compare current deps with previous deps using Object.is for each element. If any differ, the effect should re-run.
When re-running an effect, first call the cleanup function from the previous run (if one was returned).
Handle three cases: deps undefined (run every render), deps empty array (run only on first render), deps with values (run when values change).
